description_long: This is a small, modern motorboat with a streamlined, angular hull and a partially enclosed cabin. The boat features a V-shaped bow, a raised windshield, and two vertical antennae or masts on the roof. The cabin is compact, with dark-tinted windows and a flat roof, while the rear deck is open and squared off, likely for seating or storage. The hull is primarily gray with black and white accents, giving it a utilitarian yet sleek appearance. The boat appears to be constructed from metal or fiberglass, suitable for urban waterways or marinas.
description: A compact, angular motorboat with a V-shaped hull, enclosed cabin, and open rear deck, finished in gray and black tones.
description_view_0: Side view showing the angular hull, enclosed cabin with windows, and open rear deck.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the squared-off stern, open deck area, and two vertical antennae.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the cabin profile, hull lines, and rear platform.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the V-shaped bow, windshield, and cabin roof details.
